title: Gods & Heroes Races
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_50a391d7-f186-45c4-bbf5-0e52822d2db5.png)

# 🛡️ Gods & Heroes - Origins Addon  
### 🌍 A Custom Origins Expansion for the *Gods & Heroes Medieval* Modpack

Unleash your divine potential and embrace your heritage with **10 unique races**, each designed to bring a fresh experience to your world. This Origins addon focuses on **passive racial traits** that deeply shape your gameplay — while letting you choose your active **powers** separately.

⚔️ Compatible with magic, flight, and deep customization through integration with:
- 🪄 **Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks**
- 📚 **Ars Nouveau**
- 🪽 **Icarus (Dynamic Wings & Flight Mod)**

---

## 🌟 Available Races

### 🧑 Human  
- Balanced and lucky:  
  + Increased **Luck**, **Movement Speed**, **Attack Speed**, and **Block Breaking Speed**  
  - A solid choice for any path.

---

### 🧝 Elf  
- Graceful and agile:  
  + Bonus **Bow Damage**  
  + **Climb walls**, pass through **leaves**, **Night Vision**, and **Reduced Fall Damage**

---

### ⛏️ Dwarf  
- Master of stone and tunnels:  
  + **Faster mining**, **built-in Fortune**, and **can break blocks with bare hands**  
  + **Night Vision** and **increased speed underground**  
  + Slightly **shorter than 1 block** tall

---

### 💪 Orc  
- Brute strength and endurance:  
  + **High Jump**, **Extra Health**, **Increased Damage**, and **Knockback Resistance**  
  + **Taller** than the average player

---

### 🔥 Hellborn  
- Born of flame and shadow:  
  + Cast **Fireballs**, **Immune to Fire**, **Healed by Lava**  
  + **Affinity for Fire Magic**, **Night Vision**, and **Wings to fly**

---

### 😇 Aasimar  
- Descendants of celestial beings:  
  + **Heal Allies**, **Natural Regeneration**, **Angel Wings**  
  + Bonus **Holy Damage** and **Sacred Magic**  
  + **Discounts with Villagers**

---

### 🐾 Feline  
- Swift and nimble hunters:  
  + **Fast Movement**, **Jump Height scales with Speed**, **Extended item pickup range**  
  + **No Fall Damage**, **Fast Melee Attacks**

---

### 🧙 Gnome  
- Tiny arcanists:  
  + Extremely **Small Size**  
  + **High Magic Affinity** — perfect for spellcasters

---

### 🐠 Fishman  
- Ocean-born warriors:  
  + **Aquatic Origin** — breathe underwater, **Bonus Damage in Water**, **Aquatic Night Vision**  
  + Can breathe **briefly on land**

---

### 🧚 Fairy  
- Mystical and elusive:  
  + **Wings to Fly**, **Half-block tall**, **No Fall Damage**  
  + Naturally gifted in **Magic Affinity**

---

## 🛠️ Designed for Modular Gameplay

This addon is balanced around the idea of **passive races** with **complementary powers** handled by other mods in the modpack. Pick a race, pick a power — and become the legend you're meant to be.

Whether you're a divine Aasimar, a stealthy Feline, or a flame-wielding Hellborn — the world of *Gods & Heroes Medieval* awaits.

> ⚠️ Fully compatible with other Origins Addons, Magic Mods, and RPG systems.

---

🎮 Join the adventure. Shape your destiny. Become a Hero... or a God.
